text:
is an organization that appears in the novel Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA.

Profile

The staff of NERV Japan are organizationally part of the Strategic Self-Defense Forces, this was a matter of convenience, since legally speaking the SSDF is the only organization in Japan that can maintain and use large scale weapons. Concurrently with the deployment of new equipment like the Evangelion Unit-0.0. It was dissolved after the NERV Japanese Headquarters and reformed as NERV Japan. This was to make amends, under pressure from SEELE, the United Nations and the Japanese Government among others, for the damage caused when dealing with emergencies and angels search-and-destroy network.

It is located in Hakone Caldera, now a UN-leased territory. The only organization with authority over NERV Japan is the United Nations. Each department is color-coded, with Misato's headquarters in red and Maya's engineering department in blue. Evangelion Chronicle D40 p.28 

Known Members

Pilots

Rei Ayanami - First Child
Asuka Langley Sohryu Second Child, Pilot of Evangelion Unit-02 Type II and part of Crimson A1
Shinji Ikari - Third Child, Pilot and soul of Super Evangelion and Evangelion Final Model
Rei Quatre - Clone of Rei Ayanami, pilot of Evangelion Unit-0.0 [Quatre]
Rei Cinq - Clone of Rei Ayanami, pilot of Evangelion Unit-0.0 [Cinq]
Rei Six - Clone of Rei Ayanami, pilot of Evangelion Unit-0.0 [Six], Evangelion Unit-00 Type F

Senior Officers

Misato Katsuragi - Commander
Maya Ibuki - Chief of the Science and Engineering Division Department
Tōji Suzuhara - Deputy and Acting Commander, NERV Pilot Liaison Officer

Crew Members

Kensuke Aida - Trainee, NERV Japan Department of Security Intelligence and part of the Relic Retrieval Unit
Ryoji Kaji - NERV Japan Counter Intelligence Department
Shigeru Aoba - NERV Japan Combat Officer Technician
Makoto Hyuga - NERV Japan Combat Officer Technician
Kōzō Fuyutsuki - Advisor

Equipment Used

Evangelion Units

Evangelion Unit-0.0 - Three identical units, one later transformed into Evangelion Unit-0.0 Mutant
Evangelion Unit-00 Type F - Upgraded into Evangelion Unit-00 Type F Allegorica
Evangelion Unit-00 Type F Allegorica
Evangelion Unit-01 Stage 2 Specification‎ - Upgraded into Evangelion Unit-01 Type F
Evangelion Unit-01 Type F - Evolved into Super Evangelion
Super Evangelion - Evolved into Evangelion Final Model
Evangelion Final Model
Evangelion Unit-02 Type II - Transformed into Crimson A1
Crimson A1

Evangelion Equipment

Type F Equipment - Outfitted on Unit-00, Unit-01.
UX-1 Allegorica - Outfitted on Unit-00 and Unit-02 Type II
